text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: H-hold on a second. What did you just say?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey Nature, come chat with us!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
We have a ★ marvelous ☆ topic that's right up
your alley!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh, I got that part. But what was it you
wanted to talk about?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? Am I hearing things? Mind repeating that
again for me?
